ddls:
CREATE TABLE "firms" (
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firm */,
  "name_of_firm" TEXT /* Name of the firm */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the firm */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the firm */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone number of the firm */,
  "mobile" TEXT /* Mobile number of the firm */,
  "legal_representative" TEXT /* Name of the legal representative for the firm */,
  "representation_letter_date" TEXT /* Date of the letter authorizing the legal representative */,
  "vat_number" TEXT /* VAT number of the firm */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of firm registration */,
  "firm_type" TEXT /* Type of firm (e.g., Public, Private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firm_contacts" (
  "firm_contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firm contact */,
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firm the contact is associated with */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone number of the contact */,
  "mobile" TEXT /* Mobile number of the contact */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firm_contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firm_contacts_firm_id FOREIGN KEY ("firm_id") REFERENCES firms ("firm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firm associated with the contract */,
  "contract_number" TEXT /* Contract number or reference number */,
  "contract_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract type */,
  "contract_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract status */,
  "contract_description" TEXT /* Description of the contract */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date of the next renewal */,
  "renewal_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the renewal status */,
  "contract_value" TEXT /* Total value of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_contract_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_type_id") REFERENCES contract_types ("contract_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_contract_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_status_id") REFERENCES contract_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_renewal_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("renewal_status_id") REFERENCES renewal_status ("renewal_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_firm_id FOREIGN KEY ("firm_id") REFERENCES firms ("firm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_types" (
  "contract_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract type */,
  "contract_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contract type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contract type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the contract status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contract status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renewal_status" (
  "renewal_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renewal status */,
  "renewal_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the renewal status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the renewal status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renewal_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract the communication is related to */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., Email, Letter, Meeting) */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the communication */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to any associated documents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract the document is related to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., Contract Agreement, Amendment) */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_documents_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Administrator, Procurement Officer, Legal) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., Internal, External) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the information */,
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firm the information is related to */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract the information is related to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Edit, Download) */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information regarding access (e.g., IP address, location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_firm_id FOREIGN KEY ("firm_id") REFERENCES firms ("firm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract the metric is related to */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance evaluation */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the performance */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* Reviewer of the performance evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_performance_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract version */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract the version is related to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the contract */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to the version document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_versions_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected by the change */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Insert, Update, Delete) */,
  "old_values" TEXT /* Old values before the change */,
  "new_values" TEXT /* New values after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
